title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security > Change Password. If they forget it, they can use the Forgot Password option on the login page.

title: Subscription Plans
content: We offer Free, Pro, and Enterprise plans. Pro costs $19/month and includes more storage and support.

title: Two-Factor Authentication
content: 2FA can be enabled from Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication using apps like Google Authenticator or Authy.

title: Data Export
content: Users can export their data from Account Settings > Privacy > Export Data.

title: API Access
content: API keys can be generated from Settings > Developer > API Keys. Pro and Enterprise plans support API access.

title: Billing
content: Billing settings and invoices are available in Account Settings > Billing.

title: Storage Limits
content: Free users get 1 GB storage, Pro users get 50 GB, and Enterprise users get unlimited storage.

title: Team Management
content: Users can invite team members and assign Admin, Editor, or Viewer roles.

title: Customer Support
content: Support is available through email, help center, and community forums depending on the plan.
